todos.content: Fix viem imports - remove dynamic import and use static imports
Reduce block scan range from 1M to 100K blocks to avoid RPC timeouts
Add better error handling for getLogs failures
Fix block number handling in approval events
Add batch processing for allowance checks to avoid rate limits
